rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts, with component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
generic_rules: For input envelope assumptions, use visible feature names and concrete bounds in component type contracts.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency guarantees.
Declare constants and equations in component type annexes for type-level contracts.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for equation declarations and const for constant declarations in AGREE.
Ensure type consistency: bool for boolean expressions, int for integer arithmetic, real for real arithmetic.
anti_patterns: Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints
